inspection_summary.change_shape: The execution-state synchronizer no longer invents an ownership-probe Story. It resolves the selected Story's managed and source PR routes and classifies directory ownership from each canonical template parent.

evidence: managedWorktreeArtifactLocations resolves both PR routes with state.story_id only
prRouteDirectoryIsStoryScoped recognizes {story_id} and {feature_slug} in the canonical parent template
DRS-CONTRACT-009 schema 0.2 linked artifact sync uses catalog routing without resolving a probe Story passes
scenario:OCR-S-9 schema 0.2 post-merge authority sync follows the selected Story PR route passes
Upgraded repository legacy catalog Stories remain operable
Schema 0.1 generated projection byte-copy compatibility passes
Configured flat PR route synchronization and rollback passes
Schema 0.2 named-profile pr-merge.json is copied from managed to source authority
The reconciled execution state is committed to both managed and source authorities
Existing compare-and-swap, commit-last, rollback, and concurrent replacement-writer tests pass
The only production deletion is removal of probeStoryId and both probe route resolutions
No undeclared Story is needed to infer route scope
Catalog metadata and matching Story mirror remain fail-closed for the selected Story
Delivery reconciliation success path passes for schema 0.2
Artifact synchronization failure cannot advance execution-state authority
Final persistence failure, recovery command, merge follow-up CAS, and rollback ownership tests pass
Public guarded Run and explicit execute-merge flow tests pass

inspection_summary.residual_risk: Low. Route scope is inferred from the validated canonical template rather than by comparing two resolved Stories. Existing routing validation constrains identity-preserving flat routes and catalog metadata, while the targeted suite covers both new named-profile behavior and legacy transaction/rollback behavior.

judgment_delta.previous_failure: Schema 0.2 reconciliation attempted to resolve an undeclared synthetic ownership-probe Story, conflicting with catalog and Story-mirror authority.
judgment_delta.current_resolution: Ownership classification uses only the selected Story's resolved canonical PR route template for managed and source repositories.
